name: omni-context-obsidian-plugin
description: OmniContext is a small, helpful, zero-telemetry coding assistant.

scripts.build: esbuild src/main.ts --bundle --outfile=dist/omni-context/main.js --external:obsidian --external:electron --external:@codemirror/autocomplete --external:@codemirror/collab --external:@codemirror/commands --external:@codemirror/language --external:@codemirror/lint --external:@codemirror/search --external:@codemirror/state --external:@codemirror/view --format=cjs --platform=node --minify && cp manifest.json styles.css dist/omni-context/
scripts.dev: mkdir -p dist/omni-context && cp manifest.json styles.css dist/omni-context/; esbuild src/main.ts --bundle --outfile=dist/omni-context/main.js --external:obsidian --external:electron --external:@codemirror/autocomplete --external:@codemirror/collab --external:@codemirror/commands --external:@codemirror/language --external:@codemirror/lint --external:@codemirror/search --external:@codemirror/state --external:@codemirror/view --format=cjs --platform=node --sourcemap --watch
